steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
To find $f(7)$, replace $x$ with $7$ in the function. This keeps the same rule and evaluates the output at the requested input.

$$f(7)=\frac{3(7)-1}{5}$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: Simplify the numerator first, then divide by $5$. $$f(7)=\frac{21-1}{5}$$ $$f(7)=\frac{20}{5}$$ $$f(7)=4$$ The answer is C.
